CREATE TABLE bitstrings_table (id INTEGER, bitstring_value BITSTRING);
SELECT bitstring_value FROM bitstrings_table WHERE id = 1 | (SELECT id FROM bitstrings_table WHERE id > 2) ;
SELECT id, bitstring_value | '0001'::BITSTRING AS result FROM bitstrings_table WHERE id IN (1, 2);
WITH bitwise_results AS (SELECT id, bitstring_value | (SELECT bitstring_value FROM bitstrings_table WHERE id = 4) AS new_bitstring FROM bitstrings_table) SELECT * FROM bitwise_results;
CREATE TABLE additional_bits (id INTEGER, bitstring_value BITSTRING);
SELECT a.id, a.bitstring_value | b.bitstring_value AS combined_bitstring FROM bitstrings_table a JOIN additional_bits b ON a.id = 1 AND b.id = 1;
SELECT id, bitstring_value | (SELECT MAX(bitstring_value) FROM bitstrings_table) AS max_combination FROM bitstrings_table WHERE id < 3;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT (bitstring_value | '0101'::BITSTRING) AS combined FROM bitstrings_table) AS distinct_combinations;
